arts.ttl: Fulham 2-2 Ipswich: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Raul Jimenez rescues a point for Marco Silva's side
arts.sum: Raul Jimenez scores a stoppage-time leveller as Fulham draw 2-2 with Ipswich Town in Sunday afternoon's Premier League clash at Craven Cottage.

arts.ttl: Fulham’s Jimenez closes in on Premier League penalty record
arts.sum: Raul Jimenez is closing in on a Premier League record after scoring two penalties in Fulham’s draw with Ipswich Town. The Mexican converted both goals for Fulham from the spot, including a stoppage-time leveller to earn Marco Silva’s side a point at Craven Cottage. What a second-half this has been! 😨 Raúl Jiménez scores AGAIN […] The post Fulham’s Jimenez closes in on Premier League penalty record first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans urge Boehly to sign Liam Delap
arts.sum: A host of Chelsea fans have urged their club to sign Ipswich Town forward Liam Delap amid links with a move for the England U21 international. Nicolas Jackson has developed nicely since Maresca’s arrival from Leicester City, but he missed a number of chances versus Crystal Palace and Chelsea remain in the market for a new centre forward amid Christopher Nkunku’s uncertain future at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Robinson named U.S. men's player of the year
arts.sum: United States men's national team and Fulham defender Antonee Robinson has been voted the 2024 U.S. Soccer Male Player of the Year.
